title: Bereaved Child Support Groups - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Bereaved Child Support Groups 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF DOUGY CENTER FOR GRIEVING CHILDREN AND FAMILIES DOUGY CENTER EAST PEER SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides open-ended peer support groups for those grieving a death, as well as groups for individuals living with advanced serious illness. Services are available in-person and online. Also offers specialized information and referral on these topics. 3909 SE 52nd Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Children and teens ages 3-18 and young adults ages 19-35 and their families who have experienced the death of a parent, primary caregiver, or sibling Hours: Support group times vary Email (503) 775-5683 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DOUGY CENTER FOR GRIEVING CHILDREN AND FAMILIES DOUGY CENTER SOUTH PEER SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides open-ended peer support groups for those grieving a death, as well as groups for individuals living with advanced serious illness.
